green_tea_leaves.name: Green Tea Leaves
green_tea_leaves.desc: Fresh green leaves. Highly demanded by tea masters.

wild_root.name: Wild Root
wild_root.desc: A crunchy root foraged from muddy ponds.

wind_feather.name: Wind Feather
wind_feather.desc: A glossy dark feather carrying currents of wind.

demon_horn.name: Demon Horn
demon_horn.desc: A heavy, dark crimson horn vibrating with power.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.desc: A round wooden shield reinforced with iron rings. Adds +2 Defense.

lucky_amulet.name: Lucky Amulet
lucky_amulet.desc: A protective temple amulet. Adds +1 Attack and +1 Defense.

stick.name: Wooden stick
stick.desc: A simple, unadorned length of branch, roughly hewn and stripped of its bark.

steel_dagger.name: Rusty Steel Dagger
steel_dagger.desc: A utilitarian blade forged from tempered steel.

t1_healing_potion.name: low healing potion
t1_healing_potion.desc: Contained within a small, unadorned glass vial, this thin, translucent liquid glows with a faint, pale amber hue.

basic_spear.name: Wooden Spear
basic_spear.desc: A functional, no-nonsense weapon consisting of a straight, seasoned ash wood shaft topped with a simple iron spearhead.

swift-draw_stiletto.name: Swift-Draw Stiletto
swift-draw_stiletto.desc: Forged for the moment between breath and blood.

silent_striker.name: Silent Striker
silent_striker.desc: Weighted perfectly for a quick, silent strike.

vipers_kiss.name: Viper’s Kiss
vipers_kiss.desc: A single scratch is all the medicine you'll ever need.

calamitys_edge.name: Calamity’s Edge
calamitys_edge.desc: To draw this blade is to invite catastrophe.

the_silence_of_eternity.name: The Silence of Eternity
the_silence_of_eternity.desc: It makes no sound, for it has seen the end of all things.

the_world-severer.name: The World-Severer
the_world-severer.desc: A double-bladed axe where the inner edges are serrated. It vibrates at a frequency that causes armor to shatter upon contact, ignoring physical barriers entirely.
